{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323193246ED2DC6182D30C86EA931"}"},"total":630},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7610416100632806206","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"本来以为会是大外挂传统龙傲天爽文，结果细腻之处写的不错比如对手下的举动，出乎意外的有看点，看得出来挺尽心写，主角也挺有明主之姿，守成之主遇到了诸葛亮，挺有意思","text_exts":[{"e":14,"s":11,"text":"龙傲天","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%BE%99%E5%82%B2%E5%A4%A9&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774265566C86EA931%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227610416100632806206%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227600685100820352062%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%BE%99%E5%82%B2%E5%A4%A9%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771940455,"group_id":"7600685100820352062","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2kq7ryhNAmsrQIVI+QiY6g=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/de948d03168a42bb9456254e5573ea5d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791460&x-signature=k9A1NsYak4jnPGaOmeXFP%2Fvzo9A%3D","user_id":"111150541490","user_name":"喜欢肺风草的镇北军"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"111150541490","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7600685100820352062","book_info":{"abstract":"【求生+群像+抽卡+卡牌+三观正常+成长型主角+王道】
无尽之路展开，全球陷入一场无法停下的死亡竞走。
怪物遍地，杀机四伏，绝境谜题，无尽疯狂。
这是一条永无止境的地狱之路，徒步行走，日月轮转，年复一年。
向前！再向前！
不要停下！止步则死！
全球人类在杀戮中赚取鲜血，用鲜血献祭卡片。
六大卡类：物资卡，装备卡，天赋卡，技能卡，特性卡，仆从卡。
当所有人在绝望中挣扎，为求得一次抽取卡片的机会而赌上性命时。
苏衍低头，看着手中浮现的【传说卡】。
【首抽特权】：用户每日可免费抽取一张卡，且必定获得“传说级”卡。
苏衍乐了：“每天一张顶级卡？那我还怎么输？”
每日特权，首抽传说，打造要塞，建造军团...满手顶级卡，踏平无尽路。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ca7ce32b514333838d508ccc632b11a2","author":"是亚当呀","author_id":"","book_id":"7600685100820352062","book_name":"全民抽卡求生，每天一张传说卡","book_short_name":"死亡竞走","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282028","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"22万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":864,"name":"副本","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=864&name=副本&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":874,"name":"卡牌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=874&name=卡牌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7600685158961791550","read_count":"219460","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"430331"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.3","serial_count":"159","tags":"科幻末世,穿越,求生,群像,副本,卡牌","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o8b8010c84978cc09dc2016f5fb0c4703~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779449566&x-signature=2bI5rsAVANk7%2FZ5P%2BpccpT0xOsg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"7004869767","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"73"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323193246ED2DC6182D30C86EA931"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":32,"forwarded_c
